module.name: parameter-helpers
module.description: Reusable parameter-shape helpers shared across multiple rule implementations.

scenarios.name: should return the left identifier for a defaulted parameter
scenarios.given: an AssignmentPattern whose left side is an Identifier

scenarios.name: should return null for a destructured defaulted parameter
scenarios.given: an AssignmentPattern whose left side is an ObjectPattern or ArrayPattern

scenarios.name: should return the identifier for a plain Identifier parameter
scenarios.given: a function parameter node that is an Identifier

scenarios.name: should return the identifier for a defaulted Identifier parameter
scenarios.given: a function parameter node that is an AssignmentPattern with an Identifier left side

scenarios.name: should return the identifier for a rest Identifier parameter
scenarios.given: a function parameter node that is a RestElement with an Identifier argument

scenarios.name: should return null for a destructured parameter
scenarios.given: a function parameter node that is an ObjectPattern or ArrayPattern

scenarios.name: should return the identifier name for a directly nameable parameter
scenarios.given: a function parameter that resolves to a bound Identifier node

scenarios.name: should return null for a destructured parameter
scenarios.given: a function parameter that does not resolve to a bound Identifier node

scenarios.name: should return the argument identifier for a rest parameter
scenarios.given: a RestElement whose argument is an Identifier

scenarios.name: should return null for a destructured rest parameter
scenarios.given: a RestElement whose argument is an ArrayPattern or ObjectPattern
